description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MiNiFi-CPP Verify Package that runs on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have multiple jobs: rocky-build to build a package on ubuntu-22.04, docker-tests to run tests on multiple platforms (Rocky Linux 8 and 9, Ubuntu 22.04 and 24.04, Debian 11 and 12) with cmake and make commands, and docker-python-tests to run Python tests on multiple platforms with cmake and make commands. The workflow should use caching, install dependencies, and upload artifacts.
